---
id: create-wallet
title: "Create Wallet"
description: "Creates a new wallet provider that can be used for disbursements. The wallet must be configured with supported assets and proper authentication domains."
sidebar_label: "Create Wallet"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Create Wallet"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/wallets"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new wallet provider that can be used for disbursements. The wallet must be configured with supported assets and proper authentication domains.
